hero.subtitle: Premium home cleaning and office cleaning services in Mustasaari and Vaasa. Spotless clean with satisfaction guaranteed.

about.subtitle: ABOUT CLEANING
about.title: Trusted professional cleaning agency in Mustasaari and Vaasa
about.desc: At Nordo Clean, we provide high-quality residential and commercial cleaning services. Enjoy a healthier space with our eco-friendly products and trained cleaning specialists.
about.house_desc: Thorough residential cleaning including dusting, vacuuming, and sanitizing all surfaces.
about.living_desc: Professional workspace and office cleaning for a healthier and better working environment.
about.notice: Give your home a deep clean for aesthetic and health.

services.subtitle: CLEANING SERVICES
services.title: Our excellent services
services.home_desc: We keep your home clean and fresh from floor to ceiling. Customized plans according to your needs.
services.kitchen_desc: Deep cleaning and degreasing of stoves, ovens, cabinets, and countertops.
services.moveout_desc: Hassle-free deep cleaning when moving homes. We handle the final touch to guarantee a perfect transition.
services.staircase_desc: Professional cleaning of stairwells and common areas for housing cooperatives and properties.
services.office_desc: Offices, stores, and commercial spaces kept clean by experienced professionals.
services.window_desc: Crystal clear and streak-free windows for homes and offices, fast and safe.

contact.subtitle: CONTACT US
contact.title: Send us a message
contact.success_msg: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
contact.error_msg: Oops! An error occurred and your message could not be sent. Please try again.

calculator.title: Price calculator
calculator.subtitle: CALCULATE ESTIMATED PRICE
calculator.desc: Select the service, cleaning level, and property details to get an instant estimated price for your cleaning needs.
calculator.soft_desc: Basic light maintenance cleaning: dusting, vacuuming, mopping floors, and emptying waste bins.
calculator.medium_desc: Thorough standard cleaning: soft clean tasks plus deep kitchen/bathroom cleaning.
calculator.hard_desc: Deep scrub / intensive cleaning: stubborn stain removal, oven/exhaust hood cleaning, descaling.
calculator.floors: Number of floors in the property
calculator.send_proposal: Send me the price estimate and a detailed proposal to my email
calculator.success_desc: Thank you! Your proposal request has been processed and sent to your email. We will get in touch with you shortly.
calculator.error_desc: Error sending proposal. Please double-check your inputs or try again later.
calculator.business_notice: Are you a business? Contact us directly to get a customized commercial cleaning quote.
